Not just another AI tools course.

This bootcamp is designed to help learners understand AI from a practical earning-skill angle: how to use AI, how to automate business tasks, how to build project proof, and how to prepare for freelance or side-income opportunities.

🤖

Learn AI for real work

Use AI for content, research, communication, lead handling, support, reports, and productivity workflows.

⚙️

Build automation systems

Create workflows using tools like Google Sheets, forms, email, CRM, Make/Zapier concepts, and AI-assisted processes.

🚀

Become opportunity-ready

Prepare a portfolio, case studies, freelance profile, service packages, and client approach scripts.

Who is this for?

  • College students who want AI project proof before graduation.
  • Working professionals who want to use AI for productivity and side income.
  • Freelancers who want to add AI automation services to their profile.
  • Digital marketers who want to move from content-only work to automation-based services.
  • Business owners who want to understand AI workflows for leads, follow-ups, reports, and customer communication.

What makes this credible?

Beyond Border already started as a digital marketing learning journey. Now, as the market moves into the AI era, this program continues the same vision: helping learners build skills that can create opportunities beyond local limits.

  • Practical weekly projects instead of theory-only learning.
  • Portfolio-based outcomes that learners can show to clients or employers.
  • Freelance and side-income readiness included inside the curriculum.
  • Clear focus on business use cases, not random AI tool exploration.

12-week practical module structure

Every week focuses on one useful AI skill, one business use case, and one project output.

Week 01

AI Foundation & Income Opportunities

Understand AI tools, skill paths, freelance options, and practical use cases.

Week 02

ChatGPT for Work & Freelancing

Prompting, business writing, research, proposals, and productivity systems.

Week 03

AI Content Creation System

Create content plans, post ideas, ad copy, reel scripts, and brand communication.

Week 04

Google Sheets CRM

Build lead trackers, follow-up sheets, sales status dashboards, and simple reports.

Week 05

AI for Digital Marketing

Customer avatar, offer creation, landing page copy, lead campaign planning, and follow-up scripts.

Week 06

Automation Basics

Understand triggers, actions, forms, emails, sheets, CRM updates, and workflow logic.

Week 07

Lead Capture & Follow-Up Automation

Build a system to collect leads, notify the team, and trigger follow-up actions.

Week 08

AI Email & Enquiry Assistant

Classify enquiries, draft replies, store details, and support faster communication.

Week 09

Appointment & Booking Automation

Booking flow, confirmation, reminders, CRM update, and no-show follow-up system.

Week 10

AI Reports & Dashboards

Create business dashboards and generate weekly AI-assisted summary reports.

Week 11

Freelancing Setup

Portfolio, service packages, pricing approach, profiles, outreach scripts, and client communication.

Week 12

Capstone Project & Demo Day

Build and present a complete business automation project with case-study proof.

Projects learners will build

These project outputs can be used as portfolio proof, LinkedIn content, freelance samples, or business-use demos.

📊

Google Sheets CRM

Lead tracker, follow-up tracker, status updates, and simple sales overview.

📩

Lead Follow-Up System

New enquiry capture, automatic response flow, team notification, and next action tracking.

✉️

AI Email Assistant

Classify enquiry type, prepare reply drafts, and organize communication in a tracker.

🗓️

Booking Automation

Appointment booking flow, reminders, confirmation messages, and CRM updates.

💬

AI FAQ / Support Flow

Basic FAQ assistant concept for customer support and lead collection.

📈

AI Report Dashboard

Weekly performance report, lead summary, conversion notes, and business insights.

What learners receive

  • 12-week structured learning plan.
  • Weekly project assignments.
  • Prompt library and AI workflow templates.
  • CRM and lead tracker templates.
  • Freelance profile and proposal templates.
  • Capstone project guidance.
  • Completion certificate based on project submission.

How this becomes a credit

  • Learners complete real projects they can show publicly.
  • Each project can become a case study for LinkedIn, resume, or freelance profile.
  • The final capstone becomes proof of practical AI automation understanding.
  • Instead of only saying “I learned AI,” learners can say “I built AI workflows and business automation projects.”

Learning journey

A simple path from beginner understanding to practical portfolio proof.

01

Learn the concept

Understand each AI or automation topic in a simple, practical way.

02

Build the project

Create a real workflow, template, dashboard, or automation system every week.

03

Create proof

Turn each project into screenshots, demo videos, and portfolio case studies.

04

Prepare for opportunities

Set up profiles, service packages, client messages, and freelance readiness assets.

Frequently asked questions

Clear answers help learners trust the program before joining.

Is income guaranteed?

No. Income is not guaranteed. The program focuses on practical AI skills, project building, portfolio creation, and freelance/side-income readiness.

Do I need coding knowledge?

No coding is required to start. The program begins with beginner-friendly tools and gradually introduces workflow logic and automation concepts.

Is this suitable for students?

Yes. Students can use the projects as portfolio proof for internships, freelance profiles, LinkedIn posts, and future career opportunities.

Is this suitable for working professionals?

Yes. Working professionals can use AI to improve productivity, automate repetitive work, and explore side-income service opportunities.

Will learners receive a certificate?

Yes. A completion certificate can be issued after active participation and project submission.

What is the final outcome?

Learners finish with practical AI workflows, templates, project demos, and a capstone automation project that can be shown as proof.
